raw.population: N: 33 (Thailand) [model-building group] N: 19 Age: 27.42±3.49 WT: 56.7±7.4 [validation group] N: 14 Age: ~26±~8 WT: 65±13.8
raw.objective: “to determine the optimal single oral loading dose of phenytoin in patients with seizures”
raw.covariates: Tested: Included: WT on Vm and Vd
raw.observations: The model allowed to calculate a dose that was able to result in therapeutic concentrations in all 14 validation subjects.
raw.dose: Single oral doses in healthy subjects
raw.structure: 1 compartment model with first-order absorption and michaelis menten elimination
raw.equations: if(SEX==1){ Ka=theta1*(1+eta1) Vd=theta2*(1+eta2) Vm=theta3*(1+eta3) Km=theta4*(1+eta4) } else { Ka=theta5*(1+eta5) Vd=theta6*(1+eta6) Vm=theta7*(1+eta7) Km=theta8*(1+eta8) } C=A(2)/Vd dA(1)/dt=-Ka*A(1) dA(2)/dt=Ka*A(1)-(Vm*C)/(Km+C) Cipred=C Cobs=Cipred

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
